name: rustifi
description: UniFi network MCP server for Codex — official, internal, and hybrid UniFi Network actions.

interface.shortDescription: Query UniFi network clients, devices, and health
interface.longDescription: MCP server for Ubiquiti UniFi networks. Exposes connected wireless and wired clients, network devices, WiFi configurations, site health, alarms, events, sysinfo, authenticated user info, and generated official/internal UniFi API actions through a single action-dispatched MCP tool.
defaultPrompt: Who is currently connected to my network? Show me all clients with their IP addresses.
Are all my UniFi devices online? Show me access point and switch status.
List my WiFi network configurations including SSID, band, and security settings.
